scripts.dev: npm run infra:up && npm run dev:services
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -k -n api,scraper,validator,storage,frontend -c blue,yellow,magenta,cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:scraper" "npm run dev:validator" "npm run dev:storage" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:scraper: cd services/worker && WORKER_TYPE=scraper npm run dev:local
scripts.dev:validator: cd services/worker && WORKER_TYPE=ai-validator npm run dev:local
scripts.dev:storage: cd services/worker && WORKER_TYPE=storage npm run dev:local
